description: A marketing manager wants to create a 'Buy One, Get One Free' promotion for a specific brand of shoes.

nodes.task_description: Define the parameters of the BOGO promotion: applies to all products from 'Brand X', no coupon code needed, automatically applies in cart.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly sets up the promotion rules.

nodes.task_description: Activate the promotion and set a start and end date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully activates the BOGO offer for the specified time period.
